name: Remix: Remix: Remix: Vasuki
description:
Add an interactive "Live Agent Telemetry & Log Console" component to the interface.

Requirements:
1. Position: Place it as a terminal-like panel spanning the bottom of the center "CURRENT EXECUTION FRAME" column.
2. Styling: Give it a strict monochromatic dark glassmorphism look (slightly darker background than #050505, thin subtle borders) with a font-mono text layout.
3. Content & Activity Indicators: 
   - Add a top status header row showing the status of our core daemons with colored glowing dot pulses:
     * AppTracker: Active (Emerald glow)
     * Ollama (Hermes): Thinking... (Amber/Yellow glow)
     * Memory AGI: Idle (Muted grey)
4. Mock Stream Log Data: Populate the terminal box with a few scrolling, structured JSON-like lines simulating real system activity, such as:
   - [19:38:02] [AppTracker] FOCUS_CHANGED -> VS Code (vasuki_workspace)
   - [19:38:05] [Ollama_Agent] POST /api/generate context block transmitted
   - [19:38:06] [Memory_Agent] SQLite Ledger synchronized successfully.
5. Code Setup: Implement a simple Next.js API mock fetch structure (using useEffect/useState) so that these scrolling logs update dynamically on an interval, allowing us to easily hook it up to our local FastAPI python backend server later.
